name: web-app/ts-node-service
description: TypeScript on Node 22, node:http service (no framework). API / back-end surface.
_note: Catalog + families live in architecture/catalog.json (the fixed 7, ADR-0005/0009). Back-end profile; MiniMax M3 (multimodal) stays unbound — no UI work here. Roles v2 (ADR-0022): specs name a role (owner_role), NEVER a model — resolve_roles maps it here; the only spec-level pin is model_override/verifier_override + override_reason (gate risk-flags it). P8 is structural: verifier_secondary covers an author that shares the verifier's family.
